title: StakeholderInterview
description: A structured record of one interview with a client stakeholder during discovery. Captures what was claimed, what impacts were quantified (if any), and what needs following up, with links back to EvidenceReference records. Stakeholder identity is anonymized in examples.

interview_id.description: Stable local identifier. Convention: 'intv_' followed by a short slug, unique within an engagement.

related_intake_id.description: The ClientIntake this interview belongs to.

stakeholder_label.description: Anonymized reference label for the interviewee (e.g. 'stakeholder_1'). No PII in examples.

interviewer.description: Anonymized label for the interviewing consultant (e.g. 'consultant_a').

stated_pain_points.description: Pain points as expressed by the stakeholder.

process_claims.description: Claims the stakeholder made about how processes work. Recorded as claims to be validated, not as established fact.

workflow_area.description: Optional workflow area the claim relates to (e.g. 'receiving', 'picking').

system_claims.description: Claims the stakeholder made about systems and their behavior.

system_name.description: System the claim relates to (generic label).

quantified_impacts.description: Impacts the stakeholder quantified, if any. Values are recorded as reported, with units, not independently verified here.

reported_value.description: The value as reported, kept as a string to preserve ranges/qualifiers.

contradictions_or_followups.description: Contradictions noted (internally or against other evidence) and follow-up questions to resolve them.

type.description: Whether this is a contradiction to resolve or a follow-up to pursue.

evidence_references.description: EvidenceReference ids for the interview as a whole.

consultant_notes.description: Free-text consultant notes about this interview.
